name: Sweet Potato Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Sour cream, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sweet Potato Festival, Vardamon, Mississippi, 1994.
Crust: Combine the graham cracker crumbs, granulated sugar, and melted butter in a bowl. Press into the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 6 to 8 minutes. Do not allow it to brown. Remove from the oven and let cool.
Cheesecake: Beat the cream cheese, granulated sugar, and light brown sugar in a large bowl until smooth. Beat in the mashed sweet potatoes, eggs, and evaporated milk. Stir in the cornstarch, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Pour into the crust. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 55 to 60 minutes or until the edge is set.
Topping: Combine the sour cream, granulated sugar, and vanilla extract. Spread over warm cheesecake. Return to the oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake an additional 5 minutes. Cool on a wire rack. Remove side of pan and refrigerate several hours or overnight.
